content:
✨ branch-output | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide advanced, multi-output streaming and recording capabilities for OBS Studio, allowing users to send individual sources or scenes to different destinations with custom configurations.
✨ Key Features: • Individual streaming and recording per source/scene
📖 Summary: Branch Output is an OBS Studio plugin that enhances streaming and recording capabilities by allowing individual sources or scenes to be configured with dedicated encoding settings and audio sources. It provides advanced features like automatic reconnection, per-filter replay buffers, and manual file splitting, offering granular control over output streams.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
